name: Unstable

draft.notes: 15-card pack plus an additional token card. Pack: 8 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 1 basic land, 2 contraptions, 1 token. If a foil appears it displaces a common. Foil commons/uncommons/lands appear between the uncommons and the rare; foil contraptions/rares appear between the land and contraptions. Steamflogger Boss replaces the basic land slot.

sourceNotes: Silver-border 'Un-' set. Composition also includes 45 contraptions, five basic lands, and one special black-bordered card; some cards have multiple variations. Mythic count (10) matches small sets prior to Oath of the Gatewatch. Printed in USA. 36 packs per box.
